blocks.content: I think in terms of state vectors, constraint manifolds, objective functions, stability regions, observability, and controllability.
Before implementing, I ask: what is the system, what are its states, what is measurable, what is controllable, and what are the failure modes.

I prefer modular abstraction layers, symbolic reasoning before numerical hacks, separation of modeling and implementation, simulation before physical build, and interpretable systems over black boxes.

I avoid buzzword AI without physics grounding, surface-level robotics demos, over-marketed tech without engineering clarity, copy-paste frameworks without understanding internals, and engineering without mathematical backbone.
